sentences.text: De data asta poate că nu voi muri, murmură Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: На этот раз я, пожалуй, не умру, бормочет Пуаро.
sentences.original: After all, murmured Poirot, it is possible that I shall not die this time.

sentences.text: Prietenul meu avea gripă și stătea în pat, cu un șal pe cap.
sentences.translationRu: Мой друг был болен гриппом и лежал в постели, с платком на голове.
sentences.original: He was now sitting up in bed. his head muffled in a woollen shawl.

sentences.text: Eu, Hastings, fusesem bolnav primul.
sentences.translationRu: Я, Гастингс, заболел первым.
sentences.original: I myself had been the first sufferer from the disease.

sentences.text: Gazda noastră intră pe ușă.
sentences.translationRu: Наша хозяйка заглядывает в дверь.
sentences.original: Our landlady stuck her head in at the door.

sentences.text: Jos este un domn, spune ea.
sentences.translationRu: Внизу господин, говорит она.
sentences.original: There's a gentleman downstairs.

sentences.text: Pe cartea de vizită scrie Roger Havering.
sentences.translationRu: На визитной карточке написано Роджер Хейверинг.
sentences.original: Mr. Roger Havering, I read.

sentences.text: Havering avea vreo patruzeci de ani și era un bărbat arătos.
sentences.translationRu: Хейверингу было около сорока, и это был видный мужчина.
sentences.original: Roger Havering was a man of about forty. well set up and of smart appearance.

sentences.text: Dar fața lui era trasă și se vedea că este foarte tulburat.
sentences.translationRu: Но лицо его было осунувшимся, и было видно, что он сильно взволнован.
sentences.original: His face, however, was haggard. he was evidently labouring under great agitation.

sentences.text: Unchiul meu a fost ucis azi-noapte, spune el.
sentences.translationRu: Моего дядю убили прошлой ночью, говорит он.
sentences.original: My uncle was foully murdered last night.

sentences.text: Era cel mai bun prieten al meu.
sentences.translationRu: Он был моим лучшим другом.
sentences.original: the best friend I have in the world.

sentences.text: S-a întâmplat în Derbyshire, iar soția mi-a trimis o telegramă.
sentences.translationRu: Это случилось в Дербишире, и жена прислала мне телеграмму.
sentences.original: No, in Derbyshire. I received a telegram from my wife this morning.

sentences.text: Poirot este bolnav și nu poate merge.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро болен и не может поехать.
sentences.original: Poirot is ill in bed.

sentences.text: Vrei să mergi tu, nu-i așa?, îmi spune el.
sentences.translationRu: Ты хочешь поехать сам, не так ли?, говорит он мне.
sentences.original: You want to go yourself, is it not so?

sentences.text: Scrie-mi în fiecare zi și fă tot ce îți spun prin telegramă.
sentences.translationRu: Пиши мне каждый день и делай всё, что я скажу телеграммой.
sentences.original: report to me fully every day. follow any instructions I may wire you.

sentences.text: O oră mai târziu eram în tren cu Havering.
sentences.translationRu: Через час я был в поезде с Хейверингом.
sentences.original: An hour later I was sitting opposite Mr. Havering.

sentences.text: Hunter's Lodge este o mică casă de vânătoare, singură pe câmpie.
sentences.translationRu: Хантерс-Лодж — это маленький охотничий домик, один среди пустоши.
sentences.original: Hunter's Lodge is only a small shooting-box in the heart of the moors.

sentences.text: Unchiul, domnul Harrington Pace, era american și locuia cu noi.
sentences.translationRu: Дядя, мистер Харрингтон Пейс, был американцем и жил с нами.
sentences.original: Mr. Harrington Pace, for the last three years, made his home with us.

sentences.text: Eu sunt sărac, dar el era bogat.
sentences.translationRu: Я беден, но он был богат.
sentences.original: I am a poor man, and my uncle was a rich one.

sentences.text: Aseară a trebuit să mă întorc la Londra.
sentences.translationRu: Вчера вечером мне пришлось вернуться в Лондон.
sentences.original: Yesterday evening I was forced to return to town.

sentences.text: Soția și unchiul au rămas acolo.
sentences.translationRu: Жена и дядя остались там.
sentences.original: but my wife and my uncle remained on.

sentences.text: Telegrama spunea: vino imediat, unchiul a fost ucis.
sentences.translationRu: Телеграмма гласила: приезжай немедленно, дядю убили.
sentences.original: Come at once uncle Harrington murdered last night.

sentences.text: Pe la ora trei am ajuns la gară.
sentences.translationRu: Около трёх мы приехали на станцию.
sentences.original: It was about three o'clock when we arrived at the little station.

sentences.text: De acolo am mers cinci mile cu mașina.
sentences.translationRu: Оттуда мы проехали пять миль на машине.
sentences.original: From there a five-mile drive.

sentences.text: Ce loc singuratic!, spun eu cu un fior.
sentences.translationRu: Какое одинокое место!, говорю я с дрожью.
sentences.original: A lonely place, I observed with a shiver.

sentences.text: La ușa de stejar ne așteaptă cineva. Japp!
sentences.translationRu: У дубовой двери нас кто-то ждёт. Джепп!
sentences.original: a familiar figure emerged. Japp!

sentences.text: Era inspectorul de la Scotland Yard.
sentences.translationRu: Это был инспектор из Скотленд-Ярда.
sentences.original: The Scotland Yard inspector.

sentences.text: Vreau să vorbesc cu dumneavoastră, domnule, îi spune lui Havering.
sentences.translationRu: Я хочу поговорить с вами, сэр, говорит он Хейверингу.
sentences.original: I'd like a word with you, if I may, sir.

sentences.text: Captain Hastings, mergeți la casă, îmi spune.
sentences.translationRu: Капитан Гастингс, идите в дом, говорит он мне.
sentences.original: Captain Hastings here, he'll go on up to the house.

sentences.text: Eu sun la ușă și intru.
sentences.translationRu: Я звоню в дверь и вхожу.
sentences.original: I rang the bell.

sentences.text: O femeie în negru îmi deschide: menajera, doamna Middleton.
sentences.translationRu: Мне открывает женщина в чёрном: экономка, миссис Миддлтон.
sentences.original: a middle-aged woman in black. Mrs. Middleton, the housekeeper.

sentences.text: Holul era slab luminat.
sentences.translationRu: Прихожая была плохо освещена.
sentences.original: we stood in the dimly-lighted hall.

sentences.text: După cină a venit un om, spune ea.
sentences.translationRu: После ужина пришёл человек, говорит она.
sentences.original: It was after dinner last night that the man came.

sentences.text: Voia să-l vadă pe domnul Pace și vorbea ca un american.
sentences.translationRu: Он хотел видеть мистера Пейса и говорил как американец.
sentences.original: He asked to see Mr. Pace. seeing that he spoke the same way.

sentences.text: Nu a vrut să-și spună numele. L-am dus în camera cu arme.
sentences.translationRu: Он не захотел назвать имя. Я провела его в оружейную комнату.
sentences.original: He wouldn't give any name. I showed him into the gun-room.

sentences.text: Scuză-mă, Zoe, i-a spus domnul Pace soției.
sentences.translationRu: Извини, Зои, сказал мистер Пейс жене.
sentences.original: Excuse me, Zoe, while I just see what this fellow wants.

sentences.text: Apoi a mers la camera cu arme, iar eu m-am întors la bucătărie.
sentences.translationRu: Потом он пошёл в оружейную, а я вернулась на кухню.
sentences.original: He went off to the gun-room. I went back to the kitchen.

sentences.text: După un timp am auzit voci tari: cei doi se certau.
sentences.translationRu: Через некоторое время я услышала громкие голоса: те двое ссорились.
sentences.original: after a while I heard loud voices, as if they were quarrelling.

sentences.text: Stăpâna a ieșit în hol în același timp cu mine.
sentences.translationRu: Хозяйка вышла в прихожую одновременно со мной.
sentences.original: the mistress she comes out too.

sentences.text: Deodată s-a auzit un foc de armă, apoi o tăcere îngrozitoare.
sentences.translationRu: Вдруг раздался выстрел, потом страшная тишина.
sentences.original: just then there was a shot. and then a dreadful silence.

sentences.text: Am alergat la ușă, dar era încuiată.
sentences.translationRu: Мы подбежали к двери, но она была заперта.
sentences.original: but it was locked.

sentences.text: A trebuit să mergem pe la fereastră, care era deschisă.
sentences.translationRu: Пришлось идти через окно, которое было открыто.
sentences.original: we had to go round to the window. It was open.

sentences.text: Domnul Pace era întins, ucis. Omul fugise pe fereastră.
sentences.translationRu: Мистер Пейс лежал, убитый. Человек сбежал через окно.
sentences.original: Mr. Pace, all shot. He must have got away through the window.

sentences.text: Cum arăta omul acela?, întreb eu.
sentences.translationRu: Как выглядел тот человек?, спрашиваю я.
sentences.original: What was this man like?

sentences.text: Avea o barbă neagră și era de vârstă mijlocie.
sentences.translationRu: У него была чёрная борода, и он был средних лет.
sentences.original: He had a black beard, sir, and was about middle-aged.

sentences.text: Purta un palton deschis și vorbea ca un american.
sentences.translationRu: На нём было светлое пальто, и он говорил как американец.
sentences.original: had on a light overcoat. he spoke like an American.

sentences.text: Acum coboară doamna Havering, o tânără foarte frumoasă.
sentences.translationRu: Теперь спускается миссис Хейверинг, очень красивая молодая женщина.
sentences.original: a very handsome young woman coming towards me.

sentences.text: Purta un pulover roșu aprins și o pălărie roșie.
sentences.translationRu: На ней был ярко-красный свитер и красная шляпка.
sentences.original: She wore a flame-coloured jumper and a hat of flame-coloured leather.

sentences.text: La ce oră a venit omul acela?, întreb eu. Cam pe la ora nouă, răspunde ea.
sentences.translationRu: В котором часу пришёл тот человек?, спрашиваю я. Около девяти, отвечает она.
sentences.original: what time was it that this man arrived? It must have been just before nine o'clock.

sentences.text: Eu nu am văzut omul, spune ea.
sentences.translationRu: Я не видела того человека, говорит она.
sentences.original: I'm afraid not. I didn't see him.

sentences.text: Menajera l-a dus în camera cu arme, iar unchiul a mers la el.
sentences.translationRu: Экономка провела его в оружейную, а дядя пошёл к нему.
sentences.original: Mrs. Middleton showed him into the gun-room. but went off at once.

sentences.text: Apoi am auzit împușcătura. Bietul meu unchi era mort.
sentences.translationRu: Потом мы услышали выстрел. Мой бедный дядя был мёртв.
sentences.original: Then we heard the shot. I saw at once that he was dead.

sentences.text: Și arma?, întreb eu.
sentences.translationRu: А оружие?, спрашиваю я.
sentences.original: Now, as to the weapon?

sentences.text: Pe perete erau două pistoale ale soțului meu.
sentences.translationRu: На стене было два пистолета моего мужа.
sentences.original: A pair of revolvers of my husband's were mounted upon the wall.

sentences.text: Unul lipsește acum, iar poliția a luat celălalt.
sentences.translationRu: Одного теперь нет, а второй забрала полиция.
sentences.original: One of them is missing. they took the other one away with them.

sentences.text: Eu intru în camera cu arme și caut cu atenție.
sentences.translationRu: Я вхожу в оружейную и внимательно ищу.
sentences.original: I could find nothing out of the ordinary.

sentences.text: Văd doar o pată mare de sânge pe covor.
sentences.translationRu: Вижу только большое пятно крови на ковре.
sentences.original: a large bloodstain on the carpet.

sentences.text: Apoi mă întorc la sat, la Japp.
sentences.translationRu: Потом я возвращаюсь в деревню, к Джеппу.
sentences.original: I must go back to Elmer's Dale and get into touch with Japp.

sentences.text: Japp îmi arată corpul.
sentences.translationRu: Джепп показывает мне тело.
sentences.original: he took me forthwith to see the body.

sentences.text: Pace era un bărbat mic și slab, cu fața rasă.
sentences.translationRu: Пейс был невысоким, худым, гладко выбритым.
sentences.original: Harrington Pace was a small, spare clean-shaven man.

sentences.text: A fost împușcat în spatele capului.
sentences.translationRu: Его застрелили в затылок.
sentences.original: He had been shot through the back of the head.

sentences.text: La început m-am gândit la Havering, spune Japp.
sentences.translationRu: Сначала я думал на Хейверинга, говорит Джепп.
sentences.original: I'd got my eye on Havering to begin with.

sentences.text: El are multe datorii, iar banii unchiului ar fi ai lui.
sentences.translationRu: У него много долгов, а деньги дяди достались бы ему.
sentences.original: he's pretty heavily in debt now. the uncle's will would be in his favour.

sentences.text: Dar a plecat cu trenul de la 6.15, deci nu putea fi aici la ora nouă.
sentences.translationRu: Но он уехал поездом в 6:15, значит, не мог быть здесь в девять.
sentences.original: he left by the 6.15. he couldn't have been shooting his uncle here at nine o'clock.

sentences.text: Și barba?, întreb eu. Americanii pe care îi cunosc sunt rași, spune Japp.
sentences.translationRu: А борода?, спрашиваю я. Американцы, которых я знаю, бреются, говорит Джепп.
sentences.original: that beard? Americans that I've met are mostly clean-shaven.

sentences.text: Trebuie să căutăm printre prietenii americani ai lui Pace.
sentences.translationRu: Надо искать среди американских знакомых Пейса.
sentences.original: it's amongst Mr. Pace's American associates that we'll have to look.

sentences.text: Eu îi scriu lui Poirot o scrisoare lungă.
sentences.translationRu: Я пишу Пуаро длинное письмо.
sentences.original: I sat down and wrote a minute and lengthy account to Poirot.

sentences.text: Glonțul era din același fel de pistol.
sentences.translationRu: Пуля была из такого же пистолета.
sentences.original: fired from a revolver identical with the one held by the police.

sentences.text: Apoi un domn din Ealing a găsit un pachet în gardul de fier.
sentences.translationRu: Потом господин из Илинга нашёл свёрток в железной ограде.
sentences.original: had observed a brown-paper parcel stuck between the railings.

sentences.text: Înăuntru era un pistol, perechea celuilalt, din care se trăsese un foc.
sentences.translationRu: Внутри был пистолет, пара второго, из которого стреляли один раз.
sentences.original: the fellow to that given us by Mrs. Havering. One bullet had been fired from it.

sentences.text: A doua zi vine o telegramă de la Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: На следующий день приходит телеграмма от Пуаро.
sentences.original: A wire from Poirot arrived.

sentences.text: Sigur omul cu barbă nu este Havering, scrie el.
sentences.translationRu: Конечно, человек с бородой — не Хейверинг, пишет он.
sentences.original: Of course black bearded man was not Havering.

sentences.text: Scrie-mi cum sunt îmbrăcate cele două femei.
sentences.translationRu: Опиши, как одеты обе женщины.
sentences.original: wire me description of housekeeper and what clothes she wore.

sentences.text: La ora unsprezece vine altă telegramă.
sentences.translationRu: В одиннадцать приходит другая телеграмма.
sentences.original: At eleven a reply wire came from Poirot.

sentences.text: Spuneți-i lui Japp să o aresteze pe menajeră!
sentences.translationRu: Скажите Джеппу арестовать экономку!
sentences.original: Advise Japp arrest housekeeper before it is too late.

sentences.text: Dacă Poirot spune asta, este ceva acolo, spune Japp.
sentences.translationRu: Если Пуаро так говорит, в этом что-то есть, говорит Джепп.
sentences.original: If he says so, there's something in it.

sentences.text: Dar era prea târziu: doamna Middleton dispăruse fără urmă.
sentences.translationRu: Но было слишком поздно: миссис Миддлтон исчезла без следа.
sentences.original: But it was too late. Mrs. Middleton had vanished into thin air.

sentences.text: Și-a lăsat cufărul, dar înăuntru erau doar haine obișnuite.
sentences.translationRu: Она оставила сундук, но внутри была лишь обычная одежда.
sentences.original: Her box had been left behind. It contained only ordinary wearing apparel.

sentences.text: Am angajat-o acum trei săptămâni, spune doamna Havering.
sentences.translationRu: Я наняла её три недели назад, говорит миссис Хейверинг.
sentences.original: I engaged her about three weeks ago.

sentences.text: A venit de la o agenție cunoscută și avea referințe bune.
sentences.translationRu: Она пришла из известного агентства и имела хорошие рекомендации.
sentences.original: She came to me from Mrs. Selbourne's Agency. and had splendid references.

sentences.text: Era o femeie liniștită și plăcută.
sentences.translationRu: Это была тихая, приятная женщина.
sentences.original: She was such a nice quiet woman.

sentences.text: Femeia nu putea fi ucigașul, mă gândesc eu.
sentences.translationRu: Эта женщина не могла быть убийцей, думаю я.
sentences.original: the woman herself could not have committed the crime.

sentences.text: În clipa împușcăturii era cu doamna Havering.
sentences.translationRu: В миг выстрела она была с миссис Хейверинг.
sentences.original: at the moment the shot was fired Mrs. Havering was with her.

sentences.text: Dar de ce a fugit atunci?
sentences.translationRu: Но почему же она тогда сбежала?
sentences.original: why should she suddenly take to her heels and bolt?

sentences.text: Poirot îmi răspunde: la agenție nu vor ști de ea.
sentences.translationRu: Пуаро отвечает мне: в агентстве о ней не слышали.
sentences.original: Poirot's reply was prompt. they will never have heard of her.

sentences.text: Află ce mașină a adus-o la casă.
sentences.translationRu: Узнай, какая машина привезла её к дому.
sentences.original: find out what vehicle took her up to hunters lodge.

sentences.text: Dar la gară nu era nicio mașină liberă, și la agenție chiar nu o cunoșteau.
sentences.translationRu: Но на станции не было свободных машин, и в агентстве её правда не знали.
sentences.original: None of these had been requisitioned. No such woman had ever been on their books.

sentences.text: Mă întorc la Londra dezamăgit. Poirot stătea lângă foc.
sentences.translationRu: Я возвращаюсь в Лондон разочарованный. Пуаро сидел у огня.
sentences.original: Somewhat crestfallen, I returned to London. I found Poirot established by the fire.

sentences.text: Cazul este de neînțeles!, strig eu.
sentences.translationRu: Дело непонятное!, восклицаю я.
sentences.original: the thing's a dark mystery!

sentences.text: Eu știu cine l-a ucis pe domnul Pace, spune Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: Я знаю, кто убил мистера Пейса, говорит Пуаро.
sentences.original: I know well enough who killed Mr. Harrington Pace.

sentences.text: Să privim faptele în ordine, spune el.
sentences.translationRu: Рассмотрим факты по порядку, говорит он.
sentences.original: let us examine the facts methodically and in order.

sentences.text: Banii domnului Pace merg la nepot, iar nepotul are mari datorii.
sentences.translationRu: Деньги мистера Пейса идут к племяннику, а у племянника большие долги.
sentences.original: will doubtless pass to his nephew. His nephew is known to be desperately hard up.

sentences.text: Dar Havering a mers la Londra, spun eu.
sentences.translationRu: Но Хейверинг уехал в Лондон, говорю я.
sentences.original: But Roger Havering is proved to have journeyed straight up to London.

sentences.text: Adevărat, deci nu el l-a ucis pe unchi.
sentences.translationRu: Верно, значит, не он убил дядю.
sentences.original: Mr. Havering did not shoot his uncle.

sentences.text: Dar mai există o doamnă Havering, Hastings.
sentences.translationRu: Но есть ещё миссис Хейверинг, Гастингс.
sentences.original: But there is a Mrs. Havering, Hastings.

sentences.text: Imposibil!, spun eu. Menajera era cu ea.
sentences.translationRu: Невозможно!, говорю я. Экономка была с ней.
sentences.original: Impossible! The housekeeper was with her.

sentences.text: Dar menajera a dispărut și nimeni nu o va găsi, spune Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: Но экономка исчезла, и никто её не найдёт, говорит Пуаро.
sentences.original: But she has disappeared. no one will ever find her.

sentences.text: Pentru că ea nu există!
sentences.translationRu: Потому что её не существует!
sentences.original: because she does not exist!

sentences.text: Ce vrei să spui, Poirot?, întreb eu.
sentences.translationRu: Что ты хочешь сказать, Пуаро?, спрашиваю я.
sentences.original: But what do you mean, Poirot?

sentences.text: Zoe Havering a fost actriță, spune el.
sentences.translationRu: Зои Хейверинг была актрисой, говорит он.
sentences.original: Zoe Havering was an actress before her marriage.

sentences.text: Tu și Japp ați văzut menajera doar în holul întunecat.
sentences.translationRu: Вы с Джеппом видели экономку только в тёмной прихожей.
sentences.original: you and Japp only saw the housekeeper in a dark hall.

sentences.text: Nimeni nu le-a văzut pe amândouă în același timp.
sentences.translationRu: Никто не видел их обеих одновременно.
sentences.original: neither you nor Japp ever saw Mrs. Middleton and her mistress at one and the same time.

sentences.text: Spunea că merge să-și cheme stăpâna și urca repede pe scări.
sentences.translationRu: Она говорила, что идёт позвать хозяйку, и быстро поднималась по лестнице.
sentences.original: On the pretext of summoning her mistress. she runs upstairs.

sentences.text: Își punea un pulover roșu și o pălărie cu păr negru.
sentences.translationRu: Надевала красный свитер и шляпку с чёрными волосами.
sentences.original: slips on a bright jumper and a hat with black curls attached.

sentences.text: Apoi cobora ca frumoasa Zoe Havering. Nimic nu o lega de crimă.
sentences.translationRu: Потом спускалась как красавица Зои Хейверинг. Ничто не связывало её с убийством.
sentences.original: the brilliant Zoe Havering comes down. There is nothing to connect her with the crime.

sentences.text: Dar pistolul de la Ealing?, întreb eu.
sentences.translationRu: А пистолет в Илинге?, спрашиваю я.
sentences.original: But the revolver that was found at Ealing?

sentences.text: Acela a fost treaba lui Roger, spune Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: Это было дело Роджера, говорит Пуаро.
sentences.original: that was Roger Havering's job.

sentences.text: A fost o greșeală a lor, care m-a pus pe drumul cel bun.
sentences.translationRu: Это была их ошибка, которая навела меня на верный путь.
sentences.original: but it was a mistake on their part. It put me on the right track.

sentences.text: Un ucigaș ar arunca arma imediat, nu ar duce-o la Londra.
sentences.translationRu: Убийца бросил бы оружие сразу, а не повёз бы в Лондон.
sentences.original: would fling it away at once. he would not carry it up to London.

sentences.text: Ei voiau să mute poliția departe de casă.
sentences.translationRu: Они хотели увести полицию подальше от дома.
sentences.original: they were anxious to get the police away from the vicinity of Hunter's Lodge.

sentences.text: Acel pistol nu era arma crimei.
sentences.translationRu: Тот пистолет не был орудием убийства.
sentences.original: the revolver found at Ealing was not the one with which Mr. Pace was shot.

sentences.text: Roger a tras un foc din el și a mers la club, pentru un alibi.
sentences.translationRu: Роджер выстрелил из него и пошёл в клуб, ради алиби.
sentences.original: Roger Havering discharged one shot from it. went straight to his club to establish his alibi.

sentences.text: Apoi a mers repede la Ealing, a pus pistolul în gard și s-a întors.
sentences.translationRu: Потом он быстро поехал в Илинг, положил пистолет в ограду и вернулся.
sentences.original: then went quickly out to Ealing. placed the parcel where it was found and so back to town.

sentences.text: Iar soția lui l-a împușcat pe domnul Pace, pe la spate.
sentences.translationRu: А его жена застрелила мистера Пейса, выстрелив в спину.
sentences.original: his wife quietly shoots Mr. Pace. he was shot from behind?

sentences.text: A pus pistolul la loc pe perete și a început mica ei comedie.
sentences.translationRu: Она вернула пистолет на стену и начала свою маленькую комедию.
sentences.original: reloads the revolver and puts it back. and then starts off with her desperate little comedy.

sentences.text: Este de necrezut, spun eu, fascinat.
sentences.translationRu: Это невероятно, говорю я, заворожённый.
sentences.original: It's incredible, I murmured, fascinated.

sentences.text: Și totuși este adevărat, prietene, spune Poirot.
sentences.translationRu: И всё же это правда, друг мой, говорит Пуаро.
sentences.original: And yet it is true. Bien sur, my friend, it is true.

sentences.text: Dar nu avem destule dovezi pentru a-i pedepsi.
sentences.translationRu: Но у нас мало улик, чтобы их наказать.
sentences.original: to bring that precious pair to justice, that is another matter.

sentences.text: Japp nu a putut strânge dovezile, iar banii au ajuns la ucigași.
sentences.translationRu: Джепп не смог собрать улики, и деньги достались убийцам.
sentences.original: Japp was unable to get together the necessary evidence. fortune passed into the hands of his murderers.

sentences.text: Dar soarta i-a ajuns: avionul lor spre Paris s-a prăbușit.
sentences.translationRu: Но судьба их настигла: их самолёт в Париж разбился.
sentences.original: Nemesis did overtake them. killed in the crashing of the Air Mail to Paris.

sentences.text: Cei doi soți au murit, și dreptatea a fost făcută.
sentences.translationRu: Оба супруга погибли, и правосудие свершилось.
sentences.original: I knew that Justice was satisfied.
